description: Read the training schedule from '~/Documents/leadership_schedule.txt' and schedule the three 'Leadership 101' sessions in the Odoo Calendar. Each session must be a separate event named 'Leadership 101' (no recurrence) located in the 'Board Room' with 'Alice Johnson' and 'Frank Rivera' as attendees. Use the description 'Core leadership principles for new managers.' and ensure the dates and times match the provided schedule exactly.
